clinical_note: Neurology prior-auth request for erenumab (Aimovig). Patient: Luna Pierce, age 45. Diagnosis: chronic migraine (G43.7). Migraine headache days per month: 20. Failed triptan trials: 3. Failed preventive medication trials: 2. Requesting Aimovig for migraine prevention.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires chronic migraine diagnosis, at least 15 migraine days per month, documented failure of at least 2 triptans, and failure of at least 1 preventive migraine medication.
